package.name: astar_planner
package.description:
A* global path planner for large fixed-wing/VTOL UAVs.
Integrates the weighted A* algorithm from Pegasus-Disaster-Response/Ros-workspace (commit c752b073, March 4 2026) with the existing obstacle_detection and costmap packages. Replaces the RRT* planner while preserving all obstacle detection, Kalman tracking, and zone-based avoidance capabilities.
